response.global_analysis: The video features a live concert performance by Hololive Indonesia talents, followed by a product showcase. The first segment of the song is in Indonesian, while the rest of the song is in English. The provided Reference JSON lacks specific lyrics for this song, so I am transcribing the Indonesian and English lyrics directly from the audio and synchronizing them with the vocal performances. The product showcase segment at the end includes on-screen text for the various merchandise items, which I have also transcribed and translated.
